headline: A Look At Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance and business snapshot Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) has been trading with a mixed return profile recently, with the stock down 5.7% over the past day and 5.2% over the past week, while still positive over longer periods. The company reports annual revenue of US$24.4b and net income of US$2.0b, with both revenue and net income growth figures provided. This helps frame the scale of its global building products and services operations. See our latest analysis for...

headline: Irene Esteves Joins Johnson Controls Board As Capital Decisions Scrutinized
summary: Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) has appointed Irene Esteves to its board of directors. Esteves brings experience in global finance, industrial technology, and board governance across large organizations. The appointment reflects Johnson Controls International's focus on board refreshment aligned with its business priorities in building technologies and energy efficiency.
